title: marketing-angles — Output Schema
description: Output for Skill 08: marketing-angles. Produces two files: 08-marketing-angles.json and PHASE-1.5-OUTPUT.md.

new_mechanism.description: Proprietary mechanism definition. Every $17-$47 product requires a named mechanism to shift from feature competition to process ownership.

name.description: Proprietary mechanism name. Must match new_mechanism_name from input.

naming_structure.description: The structural naming convention applied. Select based on niche feel.

positioning_statement.description: Mandatory template: '[Mechanism Name]: the only method that [desired result] without [main pain point] — even if [biggest objection].'

nesb_validation.description: Four-axis mechanism validation. All four must pass before deployment.

new.description: Explain how the mechanism feels unlike anything the audience has tried before.

easy.description: Explain how the mechanism removes the dominant friction or effort barrier.

safe.description: Explain how the mechanism eliminates the biggest perceived risk.

big.description: Confirm the promised result matches the price point. $17=quick win | $27=repeatable system | $37=identity shift | $47=business transformation.

top_10_angles.description: Exactly 10 ranked marketing angles. Each mapped to correct awareness level. All hooks filled for the specific niche.

archetype.description: One of the 6 core angle archetypes.

primary_emotion.description: The single emotion this angle triggers. Must match or complement dominant_emotion from input.

best_platform.description: The single platform where this angle performs best given format and audience heat.

awareness_level.description: The audience awareness level this angle targets. Must never mismatch traffic temperature.

proof_type.description: Exact proof asset required for this angle. e.g. 'Before/After visual contrast graph', 'Screen recording time-stamped demo', 'Raw SMS/email screenshots'.

hooks.description: Three hook variants filled with exact validated_niche and persona details.

question.description: Hook written as a question. Fully filled for this niche — no placeholders.

statement.description: Hook written as a declarative statement. Fully filled for this niche — no placeholders.

negative_constraint.description: Hook using 'without', 'even if', or 'no [objection]' constraint. Fully filled for this niche — no placeholders.

angle_library_30.description: Complete 30-angle library. 6 categories × 5 angles. All core_hook_sentence fields filled for the specific niche. HALT if fewer than 30.

category.description: One of 6 categories. Each must have exactly 5 angles.

angle_name.description: Named angle within the category. e.g. 'Elite Club', 'System Rigged', 'Weird Hack'.

core_hook_sentence.description: Fill-in-the-blank hook sentence adapted for this niche. No generic placeholders — niche-filled.

primary_emotion.description: Primary emotion triggered by this angle.

best_platform.description: Best deployment platform for this angle.

recycling_system_1_to_7.description: One-to-seven content recycling system. Takes the #1 ranked angle and transforms it into 7 platform-native formats. All fields filled for the specific niche.

source_angle.description: The name of the #1 ranked angle used as the base for recycling.

tiktok_hook.description: Raw face-to-camera hook under 60s. Structure: [Old way] is dead → [New mechanism] → [Result in 7 days]. Filled for niche.

instagram_caption.description: PAS structure: [Problem] → [Agitate] → [Solution + link in bio]. Social SEO keywords in natural language. Filled for niche.

email_subject.description: 4-6 word curiosity-gap subject line. e.g. 'The weird reason your [goal] is failing...' Never clickbait — always deliverable.

email_body_structure.description: 300-word story arc. Discovery of mechanism → Root cause → Product as easy button → CTA. Uses verbal bridges: 'That said,' / 'But here's the thing,'

sales_page_headline.description: NESB formula: 'The Only [Mechanism] That Lets [Persona] Achieve [Result] Without [Pain] in Just [Timeframe].' Filled for niche.

meta_ad_copy.description: AIDA structure: [Attention: stop old way] [Interest: 10k+ switched] [Desire: benefit + price] [Action: tap Learn More]. Filled for niche.

pinterest_pin_text.description: Visual listicle overlay text: '3 Steps to [Result] Using the [Mechanism] Method'. High contrast, 2:3 format, links to sales page. Filled for niche.

launch_sequence_30_days.description: Three-phase 30-day angle deployment sequence mapped to audience temperature.

phase_1_cold.description: DISRUPTION phase. Days 1-10. Cold traffic. Never pitch the product in Phase 1.

angles.description: Angle names deployed in this phase. Must include Enemy, Contrarian, Discovery archetypes.

platforms.description: Platforms active in this phase. e.g. ['tiktok_organic', 'meta_tof_ads'].

strategy.description: Strategic intent: invalidate existing beliefs, reveal root cause. No product mention.

phase_2_warm.description: INDOCTRINATION phase. Days 11-20. Warm traffic. Introduce mechanism as logical solution.

angles.description: Angle names. Must include Identity, New Mechanism, Social Proof archetypes.

strategy.description: One case study per email. Identity shift framing. Mechanism revealed as only logical solution.

phase_3_close.description: 4-DAY CASH MACHINE. Days 21-30. Hot traffic. Speed + Bandwagon + FOMO. Days 27-30 must have specific daily content.

angles.description: Angle names. Must include Speed, Bandwagon, FOMO archetypes.

key_days.description: Specific content for each of the 4 final days. All fields required.

day_27.description: Crazy Deal announcement — price + urgency anchor.

day_28.description: Value stack reveal — all bonuses listed with individual values.

day_29.description: Mass Exodus social proof — e.g. '500 joined yesterday'.

day_30.description: Final Warning — deadline ultimatum. e.g. 'price doubles at midnight'.

competitive_gap.description: Competitive angle audit. Identifies the blue ocean angle no competitor is using.

dominant_pattern.description: What all competitors do. Pulled from competitor_dominant_angle in input.

blue_ocean_angle.description: The one angle none of the competitors are using. Selected from 3 options: Radical Transparency, Taboo/Mistake Reveal, or Identity Stage 5.

disruptor_axis.description: The core disruptor axis for the blue ocean angle.

differentiation_statement.description: One-sentence statement of how this brand will be fundamentally different from all competitors in the market.

angle_testing_protocol.description: Standardised angle validation protocol. Deploy 5 variants → 72h window → kill or scale.

hook_variants_to_test.description: Always 5 hook variants per test cycle.

deployment_platform.description: Primary organic platform for initial testing. e.g. 'TikTok organic / Instagram Reels'.

hold_rate_kill_threshold.description: 3-second hold rate below 40% → angle is dead. Pivot immediately.

hold_rate_scale_threshold.description: 3-second hold rate above 60% → angle validated. Move to paid traffic.

decision_window_hours.description: Maximum hours before a kill or scale decision must be made.

scaling_trigger.description: The exact condition that triggers paid scaling. e.g. 'Hold rate >60% sustained for 48h with average watch time >15s.'

angle_stacking_rules.description: Rules for stacking multiple hook types in the opening 3 seconds of content.

max_hooks_per_opening.description: Never stack more than 2 hooks in the first 3 seconds.

example_stack.description: A complete stacked hook example filled for this specific niche. No placeholders.

tiktok_flash_script.description: Complete 23-second TikTok script ready to shoot. All fields filled for this niche — no placeholders.

hook_3s.description: [0-3s] Pattern interrupt. Old method is dead. Filled for niche.

agitate_5s.description: [3-8s] Not their fault. Hidden root cause revealed. Filled for niche.

value_demo_10s.description: [8-18s] System demo + result + timeframe. Filled for niche.

cta_5s.description: [18-23s] Price anchor + link in bio + urgency. Filled for niche.

output_files.format: Pure JSON only — no markdown fences. All fields from this schema populated.
constraints: top_10_angles: exactly 10 items, all hooks filled for niche

sections: 2. Top 10 Angles — ranked table with hooks
5. Competitive Gap — blue ocean angle selected
6. Testing Protocol — thresholds and pivot rules
7. TikTok Flash Script — ready to shoot

halt_conditions.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: marketing-angles — final output file missing]

fatal_errors: Any angle deployed at wrong awareness level
Mechanism name uses a banned word from 07-brand-voice.json
Recycling system has fewer than 7 formats
Angle stacking uses more than 2 hooks in first 3 seconds
Hooks or Value Stack produced (belongs to Skill 05 only)
